Table.Name: country
Table.ExplicitJoin: cntry.country = (select top 1 country from country where country.ssd_ec_code = itm.origin)

Table.Name: itemprice
Table.ExplicitJoin: pri.item = itm.item AND pri.curr_code = cp.curr_code and (pri.effect_date = (Select Max(pri2.effect_date) from itemprice pri2 where pri.item = pri2.item AND pri.curr_code = pri2.curr_code AND pri2.effect_date <= dbo.GetSiteDate(getdate()) ) )

Table.Name: taxcode
Table.ExplicitJoin: tax1.tax_code = itm.tax_code1 and tax1.tax_system = 1 and tax1.tax_code_type = case taxsys1.tax_mode when 'A' then 'E' else 'R' end

Table.Name: taxcode
Table.ExplicitJoin: tax2.tax_code = itm.tax_code2 and tax2.tax_system = 2 and tax2.tax_code_type = case taxsys2.tax_mode when 'A' then 'E' else 'R' end

Method.Name: CreateItemSp
Method.Description: Used by Manufacturing Window to create new item header.

Method.Name: GetItemsPriceForCustItemSp
Method.Description: Method to get all items for a customer item

Property.Name: DerBOMExist
Property.Expression: CASE WHEN (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM dbo.job WHERE job.job = Job AND job.suffix=1)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

Property.Name: DerCanChangeKit
Property.Expression: CASE WHEN (DerCanChangeKit1 = 1 AND DerCanChangeKit2 = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

Property.Name: DerCanChangeKit1
Property.Expression: CASE WHEN (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM dbo.coitem WHERE coitem.item = Item) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM dbo.co_bln WHERE co_bln.item = Item) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM dbo.citemh WHERE citemh.item = Item)) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END

Property.Name: DerCanChangeKit2
Property.Expression: CASE WHEN (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM dbo.coh_bl WHERE coh_bl.item = Item) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM dbo.trnitem WHERE trnitem.item = Item) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM dbo.projmatl WHERE projmatl.item = Item)) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END

Property.Name: DerCostForm
Property.Expression: (CASE when exists (select 1 from dbo.invparms as prm where prm.cost_item_at_whse = 0) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END)

Property.Name: DerCurFovhdCost
Property.Expression: CASE PMTCode WHEN N'P' THEN 0 ELSE CurFovhdCost END

Property.Name: DerCurUCost
Property.Expression: (CASE when exists (select 1 from dbo.invparms as prm where prm.cost_item_at_whse = 0) THEN ISNULL(CurUCost, 0) ELSE NULL END)

Property.Name: DerFrzAsmSubtotal
Property.Expression: FrzAsmSetup + FrzAsmRun + FrzAsmMatl + FrzAsmTool + FrzAsmFixture + FrzAsmOther + FrzAsmFixed + FrzAsmVar + FrzAsmOutside

Property.Name: DerFrzCompTotal
Property.Expression: FrzCompSetup + FrzCompRun + FrzCompMatl + FrzCompTool + FrzCompFixture + FrzCompOther + FrzCompFixed + FrzCompVar + FrzCompOutside

Property.Name: DerFrzcostExist
Property.Expression: CASE WHEN FrzAsmSetup IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END

Property.Name: DerHasException
Property.Expression: CASE WHEN (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM dbo.exc_mesg WHERE exc_mesg.item = Item)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

Property.Name: DerItemContentExist
Property.Expression: CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT TOP 1 1 FROM dbo.item_content_ref WHERE item_content_ref.item = Item ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

Property.Name: DerItmAsmSubtotal
Property.Expression: AsmSetup + AsmRun + AsmMatl + AsmTool + AsmFixture + AsmOther + AsmFixed + AsmVar + AsmOutside

Property.Name: DerItmCompTotal
Property.Expression: CompSetup + CompRun + CompMatl + CompTool + CompFixture + CompOther + CompFixed + CompVar + CompOutside

Property.Name: DerLotLocExists
Property.Expression: CASE WHEN (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM dbo.lot_loc WHERE lot_loc.item = Item)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

Property.Name: DerMainQtyAllocjob
Property.Expression: (CASE WHEN MfgWhse = ITWHWhse THEN MainQtyAllocjob ELSE 0 END)

Property.Name: DerMatCurCost
Property.Expression: CurMatlCost + CurLbrCost + CASE PMTCode WHEN N'P' THEN 0 ELSE CurFovhdCost END + CurVovhdCost + CurOutCost

Property.Name: DerNonNettableStock
Property.Expression: (Select SUM(IsNull( itmw.qty_mrb, 0) ) from {itemwhse} as itmw where itmw.item = itm.item)

Property.Name: DerPurAvgFovhdCost
Property.Expression: CASE PMTCode WHEN N'P' THEN AvgFovhdCost ELSE 0 END

Property.Name: DerPurCurCost
Property.Expression: CurMatCost + CurFreightCost + CurDutyCost + CurBrokerageCost + CurInsuranceCost + CurLocFrtCost + CASE PMTCode WHEN N'P' THEN CurFovhdCost ELSE 0 END

Property.Name: DerPurCurFovhdCost
Property.Expression: CASE PMTCode WHEN N'P' THEN CurFovhdCost ELSE 0 END

Property.Name: DerPurFovhdCos
Property.Expression: CASE PMTCode WHEN N'P' THEN FovhdCost ELSE 0 END

Property.Name: DerQtyAvailable
Property.Expression: CASE WHEN dbo.GetSiteItemQtyAvailable(Item, PortalPricingSite) >= 0 THEN dbo.GetSiteItemQtyAvailable(Item, PortalPricingSite) ELSE 0 END

Property.Name: DerQualityControlItem
Property.Expression: CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM dbo.RS_QCItemh WHERE RS_QCItemh.item = itm.item) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

Property.Name: DerSafetyStock
Property.Expression: (Select SUM(IsNull( itmw.qty_reorder, 0) ) from {dbo.itemwhse} as itmw inner join dbo.whse on itmw.whse = whse.whse where itmw.item = itm.item and whse.dedicated_inventory = 0)

Property.Name: DerSSDate
Property.Expression: CASE WHEN year(SSDATE) <= 1970 THEN NULL ELSE SSDATE END

Property.Name: DerUnitCost
Property.Expression: (CASE when exists (select 1 from dbo.invparms as prm where prm.cost_item_at_whse = 0) THEN ISNULL(UnitCost, 0) ELSE NULL END)

Property.Name: DerUseGroupOrPieces
Property.Expression: CASE WHEN DimensionGroup IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(ip.item) FROM dbo.item it INNER JOIN dbo.itempiece ip ON it.item = ip.item WHERE it.item = Item) > 0 THEN 0 WHEN DimensionGroup IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(ip.item) FROM dbo.item it INNER JOIN dbo.itempiece ip ON it.item = ip.item WHERE it.item = Item) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE -1 END

Property.Name: InWorkflow
Property.Description: Indicates if there is a workflow associated with this record

Property.Name: iwvQtyAllocCo
Property.Description: Aggregate column used by derived property

Property.Name: iwvQtyAllocTrn
Property.Description: Aggregate column used by derived property

Property.Name: iwvQtyOnHand
Property.Description: Aggregate column used by derived property

Property.Name: iwvQtyOrdered
Property.Description: Aggregate column used by derived property

Property.Name: iwvQtyPurYtd
Property.Description: Aggregate column used by derived property

Property.Name: iwvQtyReorder
Property.Description: Aggregate column used by derived property

Property.Name: iwvQtyRsvdCo
Property.Description: Aggregate column used by derived property

Property.Name: iwvQtySoldYtd
Property.Description: Aggregate column used by derived property

Property.Name: iwvQtyTrans
Property.Description: Aggregate column used by derived property

Property.Name: iwvQtyWip
Property.Description: Aggregate column used by derived property

Property.Name: PictureExistsFlag
Property.Expression: CASE WHEN Picture IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
